raw_action_dict.reasoning: Car is off-track with all_wheels_on_track=false, 0.396m right of center (nearly at edge), so I must steer hard left to recover onto the track centerline.
knowledge: Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn
Near WP84-91, track curves sharply right — heading transitions from ~-149° toward ~-176°
Track width ~0.76m — small corrections sufficient, avoid overcorrecting
Car drifted right of center repeatedly — sustained -20° steering caused off-track at WP85-86
When off-track or near edge, switch to positive (left) steering to recover
WP+5 target gives large positive delta on this section — confirms left steer needed
Heading near -172° is nearly due-west; track curves right but car is too far right already
Recovery from right edge: use +25° steering at 0.75 speed to avoid further drift
After recovery to center, reduce steering to avoid oscillation
